strings.home.subtitle: A local, simple and beautiful tool to write, organize and maintain game design documents. With segments, checklist, assets and multi-project support.
strings.home.openFileAlert: Open the .GDD file from your disk to continue.
strings.home.featureMulti.title: Multiple GDDs
strings.home.featureMulti.body: Each project has its own .GDD file. Organize all your games without limits.
strings.home.featureSegments.title: Modular segments
strings.home.featureSegments.body: Hero, text, grids, stats, characters, bosses, relics, notes and more.
strings.home.featureChecklist.title: Checklist with groups
strings.home.featureChecklist.body: Tasks grouped by type: pending, in progress, done and blocked.
strings.home.featureAssets.title: Assets and images
strings.home.featureAssets.body: Upload images to your segments. Everything is saved in the .GDD file.
strings.home.featureFiles.title: .GDD files
strings.home.featureFiles.body: Export and import .GDD files. Your data, your control.
strings.home.featureLocal.title: 100% local
strings.home.featureLocal.body: Everything runs in your browser. No server, no account, no internet.
strings.editor.noFile.title: No GDD is open
strings.editor.noFile.body: Open a .GDD file or start a new one to begin working.
strings.lang.label: Language
strings.common.author: Translation
